name: CRISPR Off-Target Site Predictor
description: Scans a reference DNA sequence for potential off-target sites where a CRISPR guide could mis-cut. Slides the protospacer across both strands of the reference, counts mismatches at each window, checks for a valid PAM (NGG for Cas9, TTTV for Cas12a), and assigns each site a HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW risk score using seed-region logic. Supports Cas9 and Cas12a, and circular references for plasmid scanning.

inputs.name: protospacer
inputs.description: The DNA protospacer WITHOUT the PAM. 20 bp for Cas9, 23 bp for Cas12a. Only A, T, G, C — no ambiguous bases.

inputs.name: reference
inputs.description: The DNA sequence to scan for off-target sites. Accepts a resource name (e.g. 'pBR322'), a raw sequence string, a FASTA-formatted string, or a GenBank-formatted string. The framework resolves these automatically.

inputs.name: nuclease
inputs.description: Which nuclease to model. One of 'cas9' (default) or 'cas12a'. Determines protospacer length, PAM (NGG for Cas9, TTTV for Cas12a), and seed-region size.

inputs.name: max_mismatches
inputs.description: Flag sites with this many mismatches or fewer. Default 3.

inputs.name: is_circular
inputs.description: If true, wrap the reference end-to-start before scanning so sites spanning the origin of a circular plasmid are not missed. Default false.

outputs.description: A dictionary containing protospacer, nuclease, reference_length, strands_scanned, sites_evaluated, offtarget_sites (list of {position, strand, sequence, mismatches, mismatch_positions, seed_mismatches, has_pam, risk}), high_risk_count, max_offtarget_cfd, and a one-sentence specificity_summary.

result.specificity_summary: 1 HIGH-risk on-target site found; 0 additional off-target sites within 3 mismatches.
No HIGH-risk sites found in pBR322.
